description: Represents the pipeline memory, recruiter interaction velocity, and outcomes tracking of the career operating system.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline element.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Links the tracker process item to the candidate.

columns.name: job_id
columns.constraints: FOREIGN KEY(scraper_job.id), ON DELETE SET_NULL, NULLABLE
columns.description: Optional integration link to a normalized scraped job posting.

columns.name: stage_updated_at
columns.description: Used to track time spent in this active stage (Stage Duration metrics).

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating the last pipeline update.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for this interaction timeline event.

columns.name: tracker_item_id
columns.description: Links the interaction to a specific application tracker track.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Interaction transcripts, recruiter responses, or notes.

columns.name: responded
columns.description: Used to calculate hiring velocity, ghost rates, and response metrics.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the interaction took place.
